title: Soft Touch Newborn Essentials Baby Fleece Blanket Set – 3x 75x75cm Micro Plush for Comfort in Car Seat, Cot & Pram – Unisex for Baby Boys & Girls
features: Cosy Comfort for Newborns Anywhere: This fleece baby blanket set offers warmth and softness for any moment. Perfect as a baby comforter, cot blanket, or baby car seat blanket at home or on the go.

Gentle on Delicate Skin: Made from super soft micro plush 100% polyester, each baby fleece blanket is breathable and ideal for sensitive newborn skin. Your go-to for everyday cuddles and baby essentials.
Hassle-Free for Busy Parents: Designed to stay soft after every wash, these baby blankets are machine washable and quick drying. Offering durability and ease for modern parenting.

Perfectly Sized for Swaddles & Travel: Measuring 75cm x 75cm, each baby blanket is just right for prams, cots, and car seats. Lightweight and compact, it also works as a travel blanket or receiving blanket

Charming Variety in Every Set: Each set includes 3 cute blankets in your chosen colour, with randomly selected prints. Making it a sweet new baby gift or a thoughtful touch to any baby essentials bundle.
description: Product Description Value for Money 3 Blankets 1 Insane Price Soft Touch prides itself in offering high quality baby products, at affordable prices. EST 1986, Soft Touch has sold millions of products to the babywear industry in the UK and has a fantastic reputation for quality and value. Wrap Your Baby in Peaceful Sleep Huge savings for bulk--purchases with a business account! Perfect for pre-school, nursery, kindergarten or use at home, in the park, out and about. Designed for softness and warmth, our fleece blanket helps your baby settle, rest, and feel secure all day and night Plenty of Choice Each purchase comes with 3 different designs. Along with our 4 colour variations, you could have a total of 12 different blanket styles to choose from! Designs are as follows: Stars Design Chain Pattern Design Elephants & Sun Design Safe, Soft, and Skin-Loving Made for delicate newborn skin— our fleece keeps your little one cosy, without compromise. Each blanket is made from the same high quality fabrics whilst maintaining breathability and function. Perfect for Tummy Time! Lay this blanket down on your floor to add an extra layer of comfort for your infant to lay, play and stay comfortable. The Soft Touch Newborn Essentials Baby Fleece Blanket Set is a must-have for any new parent, offering comfort, warmth, and practicality all in one. This set includes three 75cm x 75cm fleece blankets, offering the perfect new-baby gifts. Designed to be ultra-soft and gentle on sensitive baby skin, these baby blankets are ideal for use in car seats, cots, and prams, providing a cosy haven wherever you go. Built for Real Parenting Life Machine washable, quick-drying, and always soft — because life with a baby is already full enough.
